examples.title: Common Phthalates - Endocrine Disruption
examples.description: Compare endocrine disrupting effects across major phthalate plasticizers
examples.chemicals:
DEHP:bis(2-ethylhexyl) phthalate
DIUP:diisoundecyl phthalate
DTDP:ditridecyl phthalate
DIDP:diisodecyl phthalate
DINP:diisononyl phthalate

examples.title: Common Food Additives - Metabolic Effects
examples.description: Examine metabolic impacts of common food preservatives and sweeteners
examples.chemicals:
sucrose
aspartame
sorbitol
sodium benzoate
potassium sorbate

examples.title: Industrial Solvents - Neurotoxicity
examples.description: Compare neurotoxic potential of common industrial solvents

examples.description: Assess developmental toxicity of common heavy metals

chromium trioxide

examples.title: Pesticides - Reproductive Effects
examples.description: Compare reproductive toxicity of different pesticide classes

examples.title: Flame Retardants - Thyroid Effects
examples.description: Examine thyroid disruption by common flame retardants

TDCPP:tris(1,3-dichloro-2-propyl) phosphate

examples.description: Evaluate skin sensitization potential of common cosmetic preservatives

examples.description: Assess hepatotoxic potential of various plasticizers
